Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2300 "KETTLE-4000-2300" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $4000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Kettle.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $4000 which copies 768 bytes of data from $4030 down to $0100 so that the dump can start at $0400. Also removed what seemed to be some cartridge detection protection by adding an RTS at $335A.
